name: CoJax Oil & Gas Corp
summary: PART I Overview We are an early-stage development oil and gas company seeking to become an independent energy company. Our assets and principal properties are located in the Gulf States Drill Region, where we target acquisition and subsequent exploitation and development of crude oil and natural gas, including acquisitions of hydrocarbon revenues and underlying oil and gas exploration and production rights.
